fall-harvest-pot-pie-skillet.name: Fall Harvest Pot Pie Skillet

ingredients.prep: white and light green parts only, chopped

instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200°C).
Melt the butter in a 10-inch (25 cm) cast iron skillet over medium heat. Add the leek and garlic, and sauté for 5 minutes, or until the leek is tender and just beginning to brown.
Add the butternut squash, carrots, potatoes, salt, and pepper. Sauté for 1–2 minutes, until salt is dissolved and everything is combined.
Pour in the chicken broth and simmer for 8–10 minutes, or until the vegetables are starting to soften and the liquid has reduced by half. Stir in the Brussels sprouts.

Add the Campbell’s® Cream of Chicken Soup, thyme, sage, heavy cream, Parmesan cheese, and chicken, and stir to incorporate. Bring to a simmer. Season with more salt and pepper if desired, then remove the pan from the heat.
Roll the puff pastry out slightly if needed to fit over the pan, then place over the skillet. Using a sharp knife, trim off any overhanging edges and reserve the excess dough.
Tuck the pastry down around the inner edge of the skillet. Using a fork, press gently around the edges of the pastry to seal and crimp. Cut 4 vent holes in the center of the crust to release steam.
Cut out 4 leaf shapes from the excess dough.
In a small bowl, whisk together the egg and water, then brush evenly over the crust. Arrange the leaves on top and brush with the egg wash.
Bake the pot pie for 30–35 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown and the filling is bubbling. Remove from the oven and let rest for 10 minutes before serving.
Enjoy!

fancy-cocktail-the-island-shaker.name: Fancy Cocktail: The Island Shaker
instructions: In a cocktail shaker filled with ice, combine the vanilla vodka, coconut rum, cream of coconut, and pineapple juice. Shake for 20 seconds, then strain.
Garnish.
Enjoy!

fast-and-creamed-spinach.name: Fast And Creamed Spinach

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large soup pot over high heat; add spinach, cover, and cook for 1 minute. Uncover and gently stir until most of the leaves are bright green and wilted, about 2 minutes.

Quickly drain spinach in a strainer and transfer to a plate lined with 4 or 5 paper towels. Once cool enough to handle, squeeze as much liquid from the spinach as possible. Transfer spinach to a cutting board and coarsely chop.
Mix cayenne pepper, nutmeg, salt, and black pepper in a small bowl.

Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat; stir in shallot and cook until just barely golden and translucent, 3 to 4 minutes. Stir in seasoning mixture and pour in cream; increase heat to medium-high and simmer until the cream sauce reduces by about half, about 5 minutes. Stir in lemon zest.

Reduce heat to low and toss spinach with cream sauce in skillet. Cook and stir until spinach is heated through and coated, about 2 minutes. Stir in Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese until thoroughly combined.
Serve immediately.

fatous-lebanon-argiro.name: Fatous (lebanon)

ingredients.item: 2 ounces small with the peel in slides
2 ounces small with the peel in slides

instructions: In a bowl, combine all the injectors for the sauce.
Cut the pies horizontally and divide them into pieces of 3 cm.
Heat olive oil in a saucepan and when it burns, add the chopped pies to brown for 3'-4'.
We put them on absorbent paper, we use them in the Lebanese salad.
Add the tomatoes, pepper, cupcakes, fresh onions, radishes, parsley and mint leaves to a salad maker.
Pour up half the baked pies and pour with the sauce after being it well to become cream.
Mix very well and divide the salad into 4 dishes.

fiesta-onions.name: Fiesta Onions

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Combine vinegar and water in a large bowl. Whisk sugar into the vinegar mixture until dissolved. Add onion slices and marinate at least 3 hours; drain.
Whisk mayonnaise, celery seed, salt, and pepper together in a separate bowl; add to drained onion slices and fold to coat. Marinate at least 2 hours before serving.

fig-custard-cake-lezzet.name: Fig Custard Cake
instructions: 1. Deeply break eggs in the room heat.
2. Add sugar and add 4-5 minutes to the mixer and cut it.
3. Un add rare figs in the form of natural, dry powder and backgammon membrane and mix push with spoon.
4. 25-30 santim ç internal transfer the cake dough that you care for a round glass raft coated.
5. Bake cake mortar &ouml from 180 degree oven to 40 minutes.
6. Store the Keki from the oven and warm.
7. Granular coffee and powder sugar are accessible to warm water and string and hot cake.
8. For starch, crisp and sugar are accessible to a pot and milk also add azar azar and wire ç with the help of whipper &l;
9. In the medium-heated fire, suede until it comes to the joints of mixed and darkened.
10. Add to the cream and add 7-8 minutes to the mixer and cut it.
11. 11. 11. 11. Go to the cake u and wait for a night in the refrigerator.
12. Serve s&uuml with walnut; by serving.

finger-licking-good-banana-fritters-pequ.name: Finger-licking Good Banana Fritters!
finger-licking-good-banana-fritters-pequ.original_name: Buñuelos de plátano ¡para chuparse los dedos!

ingredients.item: Extra virgin or virgin olive oil for frying

instructions: We ate the eggs, we add the molten butter, sugar and milk and we mix well. We put the flour and salt and the chemical yeast and cinnamon together and we mix them up. We cut the bananas into pieces, and they have to be at their best but they have to get soft. We put them into the mix.
We're frying for tands till they're golden.
We get out and leave them on a kitchen paper and get them to absorb the remaining oil. And we're still hot with sugar.

fish-fillet-in-the-pan-with-potatoes-and.name: Fish Fillet In The Pan With Potatoes And Creamy Sauce
fish-fillet-in-the-pan-with-potatoes-and.original_name: Ψαρονέφρι στο τηγάνι με πατάτες και κρεμώδη σάλτσα

ingredients.item: 2 pieces of fishnet (about 700 gr) cut into pendents (fat slides)
2 lees (only the white part) cut into thin slides
2 pieces of fishnet (about 700 gr) cut into pendents (fat slides)
2 lees (only the white part) cut into thin slides

instructions: Wash the potatoes very well, rub them on the outside, use them with their skin.
Boil them for 20′-25′′ until soft.
Drain the potatoes and cut them in half.
Heat the olive oil in a pan.
Add salt and pepper and add the fish nephri for about 4′ on each side.
We put it on a platter, cover it and keep it warm.
Add the leads and cars to the pan and let them wither for 4′-5′′.
Pour the wine.
Rub the pan with spatula to dissolve the solidified meat juices.
Add the fishnet and potatoes cut in half.
Cover the pan and bottle for 15′ over medium heat.
At this stage there must be little fluid left in the pan.
Add the cream, chives and check the salt and pepper.

fish-fillets-with-paprika-teleculinaria.name: Fish Fillets With Paprika
instructions: Line a baking dish with vegetable paper and have hake loins in it. Reserve. Melt the butter in a small bowl. Add paprika, some chopped basil, salt and lemon juice.

With the help of a spoon or brush, season the fish on both sides with the previous marinade. Let it marinate for about 20 minutes. After the time indicated, take the fish in the oven, preheated at 200oC, for 20 minutes.

In the meantime, heat a frying pan with the olive oil and chore garlic teeth, chopped and curgete, cut into half-moons. Season with salt and pepper and serve as a side of the hake loins, decorating everything with lemon buds and basil leaves.

fish-from-the-garden-with-lemon-teleculi.name: Fish From The Garden With Lemon
instructions: Eliminate the ends of the green bean and then cut it in half, vertically. Cook it in salt-tempered water for 4 minutes after boiling. Drain and let it cool.

In a bowl, mix the flour with baking powder and oil. Season with salt and pepper and add the beer and lemon juice. Beat it very well with a wire rod, adding the eggs one by one. Let it rest for 30 minutes.
After the time indicated, pass the green beans, one by one, through the anterior pollum and fry in hot oil. Drain on absorbent paper and serve.

fish-medallions-in-the-oven-teleculinari.name: Fish Medallions In The Oven
instructions: Place the chips on a tray, season them with salt and put them in the oven, preheated at 180°C.
When the chips are baked, cover them with the onions, cut into half-moons, and the garlic chopped. Have the fish on top, place a lemon slice on each medallion and season with salt and pepper.
Water with the olive oil and put it in the oven at the same temperature for about 20 minutes. In the end, sprinkle with mint chopped and serve.

flemish-frites-belgian-fries-with-andalo.name: Flemish Frites - Belgian Fries With Andalouse Sauce
instructions: Stir mayonnaise, tomato paste, red onion, green bell pepper, red bell pepper, lemon juice, and salt together in a bowl. Cover the Andalouse sauce with plastic wrap and refrigerate 8 hours to overnight.
Heat oil in a deep-fryer or large saucepan to 149°C (150 degrees C).
Submerge potato strips in a bowl of ice water; rinse potatoes in several changes of cold water until water in the bowl is clear. Drain potatoes and pat dry.

Working in batches, fry potatoes in the hot oil until just cooked through but still white, about 5 minutes. Transfer fries to a paper-towel lined plate to drain. Bring oil back to temperature between batches. Cool potatoes to room temperature, about 30 minutes.

Increase oil temperature to 191°C (190 degrees C). Working in batches, fry the potatoes again until deep golden, 5 to 10 minutes more. Transfer fries to a paper-towel lined plate to drain. Season fries with salt and serve with Andalouse sauce.

fluffy-omelet.name: Fluffy Omelet

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Whisk eggs until frothy; season with salt and pepper. Heat oil in a small nonstick skillet over medium heat. Add eggs and, using a heatproof rubber spatula, cook, lifting edges and tilting skillet to let uncooked egg run underneath, until mostly set, 2–3 minutes. Flip omelet and cook until set, about 30 seconds longer. Let cool slightly before slicing into ½”-thick strips.

fresh-cheese-queijadas-with-chocolate-co.name: Fresh Cheese Queijadas With Chocolate Coating
fresh-cheese-queijadas-with-chocolate-co.original_name: Queijadas de queijo fresco com cobertura de chocolate
instructions: Prepare the dough by mixing all the ingredients indicated until you get a homogeneous texture. Book it for a few minutes, then finely extend it on a floured surface, cut it into slices and use them to line the interior in small shapes.

Prepare the filling: Undo the fresh cheeses and mix them with sugar until you get a creamy mixture. Add the eggs and yolk, one by one, beating well between each addition, then add the melted butter and stir. Finally, add the sifted flour, lemon zest and cinnamon pinch and wrap.

Fill the forms (not completely) with the previous filling and put them in the oven, preheated at 160°C, for about 30 minutes. In the last 3 minutes, increase the temperature of the oven a little bit, so that the surface of the cheeses becomes more toasted, then remove them, let them cool and deform them.
Regue o centro das queijadas com o chocolate, previamente derretido no micro-ondas com o leite.

fried-milo-quaker-oat-bites.name: Fried Milo Quaker Oat Bites
instructions: Mix all the ingredients together in a bowl.
Heat vegetable oil in a shallow skillet on low heat. Once heated, dollop your batter on like mini pancakes and griddle, just as you would with pancakes.
Serve with powdered sugar, whipped cream, Nutella, syrup, or as is!
Enjoy!

fried-rice-with-shrimps-argiro.name: Fried Rice With Shrimps

ingredients.item: 2 fresh versions with finely chopped leaves
2-3 tabletspoon soy sauce with low salt
2 fresh versions with finely chopped leaves
2-3 tabletspoon soy sauce with low salt

instructions: If the shripp are large, cut them into pieces and if they are small, add them whole.
Dry them with abstract paper.
Heat the wok in modernity and add half the butter.
Once it melts, add the shrimps and short for 1 minute. Take them on a plate and cover them not to dry.
Add the remaining butter and sauté the onion with the carrot for 3-4 minutes.
Add the ginger, the white part of the fresh versions, garlic, pepper and sauce for 1 minute.
Add the price by separating it with the fingerers not stack.
Sauté for 2 minutes to start baking the rice at the base of the walk.
We collect the materials on the side of the vessel.
Add the eggs beaten to the empty spot.
Allow for 1 minute to stallize below and start to mix.
Break with the Spoon into pieces and mix with the other ingredients.
Add the soy sauce, Peas and shripp.
Sauté for 2 minutes.
Rub pepper and try if needed extra soy.
Add the green part of the fresh onion and withdraw.
Serve immediately and add some lime.

friends-forever-brownies.name: Friends Forever Brownies
instructions: Heat oven to 163°C with rack in middle. Lightly grease or butter pan and line with crisscrossed sheets of parchment or foil, leaving a 1-inch overhang.
Melt chocolate with butter in a large metal bowl set over a pan of simmering water, stirring occasionally, until smooth. Remove bowl from pan and let cool 5 minutes.
Add sugar and whisk well.
Add eggs, 1 at a time, whisking well after each addition, and whisk mixture vigorously until smooth and cohesive.
Whisk in vanilla and salt.
Add flour and cocoa and stir with whisk until incorporated and batter is smooth.
Fold in nuts with a rubber spatula.
Spread batter evenly in pan and bake until a wooden pick comes out clean, about 40 minutes.
Cool brownies completely in pan on a rack.
To remove them easily from the pan, use the parchment overhangs to lift the brownies, still on the parchment, from the pan. Cut brownies into serving pieces.

fruit-pavlova-lezzet.name: Fruit Pavlova
instructions: 1. Set oven to 120 degrees.
2. Draw oil paper cool and round with 20 cm diameter.
3. Cook the eggs until they join the mixer.
4. Add sugar spoon spoon and continue to slap until sugar is completely melted.
5. Add cream tartar and corn starch and cook for 1 minute.
6. Cook the mixture for 40 minutes by transferring it on oil paper with spoon and placing it in the oven.
7. Leave the oven cover to cool in a light break.
8. Take the chilled pavlova to the service plate.
9. Scroll to the mixer and broadcast on.
10. Place strawberry, kiwi and banana slices.
11. 11. Serve by decorating with mint leaves.
